name: dawnchat-monorepo
description: DawnChat - Your Personal AI-Powered Agent Platform (Monorepo)

scripts.dev:backend: cd packages/backend-kernel && poetry run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.build:assistant-sdk-for-host: cd dawnchat-plugins/assistant-workspace && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run --filter @dawnchat/host-orchestration-sdk build && bun run --filter @dawnchat/assistant-chat-ui build
scripts.build:backend: cd packages/backend-kernel && poetry run pyinstaller dawnchat-backend.spec --distpath ../../apps/desktop/src-tauri/sidecars --clean
scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/node_modules packages/backend-kernel/{build,dist} apps/desktop/src-tauri/{target,sidecars}
scripts.lint:backend: cd packages/backend-kernel && poetry run ruff check app
scripts.typecheck:backend: cd packages/backend-kernel && poetry run mypy app && poetry run pyright -p ../../pyrightconfig.json
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:backend && pnpm run typecheck:backend && pnpm run lint:frontend && pnpm run lint:tauri

author: DawnChat Team
